englishDefinitions: Help her fall asleep again after she has woken up.
Make or encourage a female person, child, or animal to return to sleeping.
persianTranslation: او را دوباره به خواب برگردانم
examples: The baby woke up crying, so I tried to get her back to sleep.
It took an hour to get her back to sleep after the thunderstorm.
Sing softly and see if you can get her back to sleep.
